name: zvideo_run_postprocess_on_primary_buffer
description: zVideo::RunPostprocessOnPrimaryBuffer conditionally locks the primary surface, binds it as the renderer framebuffer and FX surface, queues the pass-3 primitive, conditionally unlocks half-resolution software mode, and returns zero.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x4a6840 validates the renderer-type or half-res lock gate, the unconditional zRndr::SetFrameBufferRegion, zVideo::Fx_SetSurfaceState, and zVideo::FxPass3_QueuePrimitive calls over g_zVideo_PrimarySurfaceState, the half-res unlock gate, and return value zero.

The native primary-buffer postprocess smoke verifies the software non-half-res path skips lock/unlock while running the framebuffer/FX/primitive pipeline, the hardware path locks without unlocking, and the software half-res path locks and unlocks the primary surface.
binary_safe_evidence: VC6 cl 12.00.8168 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison passed for ?RunPostprocessOnPrimaryBuffer@zVideo@@YAHXZ at 0x4a6840 with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 80 relocation bytes; 10 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed.
